name: Doris
description: 监控 Apache Doris 分析型数据库，包括 FE/BE 状态、查询延迟、Compaction、Tablet 等
toml_template:
[[instances]]
fe_hosts = [{{range $i, $h := .fe_hosts}}{{if $i}}, {{end}}"{{$h}}"{{end}}]
username = "{{.username}}"
{{- if .password}}
password = "{{.password}}"
{{- end}}
interval = "{{.interval}}"
